zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg於1182年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Prince Rhys Gryg17歲，母親Ellwyn verch Trahaearn33歲。她與Sir Richard ab Einion在威爾士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓 塔 亞斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg于1182年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Prince Rhys Gryg17岁，母亲Ellwyn verch Trahaearn33岁。她与Sir Richard ab Einion在威尔士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓 塔 亞斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ella
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was originally a short form of any of various compound names containing ali ‘other, foreign’ ( compare Eleanor ). It is now often taken to be a variant or pet form of Ellen . It was famously borne by the American jazz singer Ella Fitzgerald ( 1917–1996 ), and has become increasingly popular in Britain since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg was born in 1182, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Prince Rhys Gryg, was 17 and her mother, Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, was 33. She married Sir Richard ab Einion in Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg est née en 1182, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Prince Rhys Gryg, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard ab Einion à Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg 1182 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Rhys Gryg 17 und ihre Mutter Ellwyn verch Trahaearn 33. Sie hat in Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Wales Sir Richard ab Einion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg è nata il nel 1182 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Prince Rhys Gryg, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard ab Einion nel Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellyw verch Rhys Grygが1182年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Prince Rhys Grygは17歳，母Ellwyn verch Trahaearnは33歳であった。ウェールズグラモーガンカドクストン ジュクスタ ネアスでSir Richard ab Einionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg(이)가 1182년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Rhys Gryg(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellwyn verch Trahaearn(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 웨일스 글램르건 카도스턴 저스타 니앳h에서 Sir Richard ab Einion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg nasceu em 1182, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Prince Rhys Gryg, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard ab Einion em Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg родилась в 1182 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Prince Rhys Gryg было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard ab Einion в местности кадокстон джукста нит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg nació en 1182, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Prince Rhys Gryg, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Ellwyn verch Trahaearn, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Richard ab Einion en Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
